name: pi-zellij-tab-status
description: Pi extension that updates the current Zellij tab name with working, waiting, and done status icons.
author: Bryan Petzinger

scripts.release:help: node -e "const pkg=require('./package.json'); console.log('Release steps: npm version <patch|minor|major>, git push origin main --follow-tags'); console.log('Next tag: v'+pkg.version);"
